seoDescription: Access your deAPI dashboard to manage keys, usage, and billing.

elements.text: Use your workspace to monitor request activity, manage billing, and coordinate model usage across teams.

hero.heading: Sign In To Your Workspace
hero.body: Access dashboards, API key management, usage insights, and team-level controls from one secure account experience.

sections.title: Why Sign In
sections.body: Account access enables full operational visibility and governance for AI workloads.

cards.title: API Key Control
cards.description: Issue and rotate keys with ownership clarity and environment separation.

cards.title: Usage Monitoring
cards.description: Track request activity and costs by product area or team.

cards.title: Team Coordination
cards.description: Align engineering and operations on one shared control plane.

sections.title: Security Best Practices
sections.body: Treat account and key operations as production-critical workflows.

cards.title: Credential Hygiene
cards.description: Rotate credentials and isolate environments to reduce blast radius.

cards.title: Auditability
cards.description: Maintain an auditable change trail for billing and access operations.

cards.title: Incident Readiness
cards.description: Prepare response paths for access anomalies and key leakage events.

contactPanel.heading: Need account onboarding support?
contactPanel.body: We can help your team configure secure account and key workflows for production usage.
contactPanel.responseTime: Onboarding support in under one business day
